## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Marcel Santilli's participation in the upcoming AUTONOMOUS summit organized by Board of Innovation.](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AUTONOMOUS summit: 4th edition, virtual 2-day event (Dec 3-4, 2025), 3 tracks, focus on AI-native business transformation](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Marcel Santilli (growthx.ai) confirmed as speaker, time slot booked for Dec 3 at 7:30 AM](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
  - [Potential talk topics: AI disrupting websites/search, growthx.ai's agentic workflow platform, or technical aspects of their service-as-software offering](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)
  - [Next step: Marcel to provide specific talk topic by early September for October agenda launch](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

## Topics

### AUTONOMOUS Summit Overview

  - [4th edition of biannual virtual summit (started Dec 2023)](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Previous success: 10,000+ signups, 70 speakers](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=106.0)
  - [Focus: becoming AI-native, scaling AI across enterprises](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=150.0)
  - [Format: 2 days, 3 simultaneous tracks](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
    1.  High-level/blue sky thinking
    2.  Practical implementation (e.g., building AI agents, autonomous workflows)
    3.  Use cases
  - [Diverse speaker lineup: AI startups, Fortune 500 companies, tool providers, academics](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=137.0)

### Marcel Santilli's Background & Expertise

  - [Previously at Scale AI, organized virtual summits (up to 30,000 live viewers, 200 speakers)](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Recent 2-hour workshop with 500 live attendees](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Current role at growthx.ai: built agentic workflow platform](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Running millions of workflows for major brands (e.g., Webflow, Ramp, Sentinel-1, Abnormal Security)](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)

### Potential Talk Topics

  - [AI disrupting websites and AI search (high interest from CEOs, founders, VCs)](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Technical deep-dive into growthx.ai's platform architecture](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [Agent orchestration](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
      - [Service-as-software model](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=382.0)
      - [Foundation/primitives of their system](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
  - [Application-focused discussion on customer use cases and trends](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=306.0)

### Speaker Guidelines

  - [Avoid sales pitches or pricing information](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Focus on capacities and generalistic insights](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Can use company examples but maintain broader industry relevance](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send proposed talk topic by early September](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Board of Innovation to finalize agenda and launch with topics in October](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)
  - [Event date: December 3, 2025, at 7:30 AM (Marcel's time slot)](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Marcel to prepare presentation adhering to speaker guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/MjVJQtNzFTV5JksJof_pySXYEcYiZf4x?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
